description_long: This house features a modern, angular design with a prominent sloped roof covered in reddish-brown shingles. The exterior walls are primarily white brick, complemented by a fenced-in yard with both grass and paved patio areas. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light, while a balcony with a green railing overlooks the backyard. The front includes a covered entryway with an orange awning and an attached garage. The backyard is enclosed by a white fence and includes outdoor seating and a small play structure, making it suitable for family living.
description: A modern white-brick house with a steep, reddish-brown shingle roof, large windows, a balcony, and a fenced yard with patio and play areas.
description_view_0: The rear view shows the fenced backyard, balcony, large windows, and patio seating area.
description_view_1: The side view highlights the long sloped roof, driveway, and the expanse of the grassy yard.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main entryway with an orange awning, garage, and large windows facing the street.
description_view_3: The opposite side view reveals the balcony, play structure, and the continuation of the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and balcony doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with an orange awning, single door, and adjacent garage.
